mapper.select: SELECT d.dept_name AS dept_name, ROUND(IFNULL(COUNT(DISTINCT tpa.user_id) / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT u.id), 0) * 100, 0), 2) AS rate FROM dept d LEFT JOIN user u ON u.dept_id = d.id AND u.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN training_plan_assign tpa ON tpa.user_id = u.id AND tpa.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN training_plan tp ON tp.id = tpa.plan_id AND tp.deleted = 0 WHERE d.deleted = 0 AND d.id = #{deptId} AND DATE(tp.start_time) >= #{startDate} AND DATE(tp.end_time) <= #{endDate} GROUP BY d.id, d.dept_name ORDER BY rate DESC

SELECT c.name AS course_name, ROUND(IFNULL(SUM(CASE WHEN IFNULL(lp.progress, 0) >= 100 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT tpa.user_id), 0) * 100, 0), 2) AS rate FROM course c LEFT JOIN training_plan_course tpc ON tpc.course_id = c.id AND tpc.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN training_plan_assign tpa ON tpa.plan_id = tpc.plan_id AND tpa.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN learning_progress lp ON lp.user_id = tpa.user_id AND lp.course_id = c.id AND lp.deleted = 0 WHERE c.deleted = 0 AND c.category_id = #{categoryId} GROUP BY c.id, c.name ORDER BY rate DESC

SELECT t.stat_date, ROUND(IFNULL(AVG(t.exam_pass), 0), 2) AS exam_pass_rate, ROUND(IFNULL(AVG(t.makeup_pass), 0), 2) AS makeup_pass_rate FROM ( SELECT DATE(es.submit_time) AS stat_date, CASE WHEN es.score >= e.pass_score THEN 100 ELSE 0 END AS exam_pass, NULL AS makeup_pass FROM exam_score es JOIN exam e ON e.id = es.exam_id AND e.deleted = 0 WHERE es.deleted = 0 UNION ALL SELECT DATE(ms.submit_time) AS stat_date, NULL AS exam_pass, CASE WHEN ms.score >= e.pass_score THEN 100 ELSE 0 END AS makeup_pass FROM makeup_score ms JOIN makeup_exam me ON me.id = ms.makeup_id AND me.deleted = 0 JOIN exam e ON e.id = me.exam_id AND e.deleted = 0 WHERE ms.deleted = 0 ) t WHERE 1 = 1 AND t.stat_date >= #{startDate} AND t.stat_date <= #{endDate} GROUP BY t.stat_date ORDER BY t.stat_date ASC
